summary: Comprehensive testing completed for AIProDucate evaluation management system. All backend APIs and frontend functionality working correctly with 100% backend test success rate.
passed_tests: GET /api/auth/me returns user info with token
POST /api/questions creates SINGLE_SELECT question with options
POST /api/questions creates MULTIPLE_SELECT question with options and penalty toggle
POST /api/uploads uploads a file to S3
Frontend: Login page works with admin credentials
Frontend: Admin dashboard shows 5 sidebar navigation tabs
Frontend: Create Evaluation modal opens and creates evaluation
Frontend: Question Bank shows eval selector and question creation
Frontend: Student Portal shows available exams with Start button
Frontend: Manual Correction page shows allocation controls for admin
Frontend: Leaders Board has both Leaderboard and Item Analysis tabs
Frontend: Student login works with proper role-based access control
Frontend: Student dashboard shows only appropriate tabs (2/2)
Frontend: Admin-only features correctly hidden from students
